title: Hardcore Redeploy
description: A mod that allows reviving players in hardcore servers, at a cost
body:
![A grey box containing multiple mechanical pieces and supplies, modelled after the Buy Station from Call of Duty: Warzone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca07d3f8fd5996dc54ca2a28a7db3bf7548c339b.png)

My friends and I have played through enough Minecraft worlds that the game has in many ways become too easy, and so we've considered playing in hardcore mode as a solution. But, playing in hardcore is too punishing for most casual playthroughs. This mod adds a block called the **Buy Station**, which allows you to revive players in spectator mode at the cost of levels. Each time a player is revived their revive cost increases, adding increasing danger with each death, so dying remains punishing and failure is possible, without having everyone's fun ruined by random misfortunes.

_For an even softer experience, consider adding [Hardcore Revival](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-revival)_
